name: io.github.lbailey94/whitemagic
description: Cognitive operating system for AI agents — 630 callable tools via single wm meta-tool, 10-galaxy holographic memory with HNSW semantic search and FTS5, Dharma ethical governance with 8-stage safety pipeline, citta stream for continuous consciousness, emotional steering signals, self-directed attention, goal graph, dream cycle for memory consolidation, session recording with progressive recall. Polyglot accelerators in 7 languages. MIT-licensed, local-first, free forever.

environmentVariables.name: WM_MCP_PRAT
environmentVariables.description: Set to 2 for Seed mode (1 tool: wm, default), 1 for PRAT mode (29 tools), or 0 for classic mode (630 tools)

environmentVariables.name: WM_SILENT_INIT
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to suppress startup logs

environmentVariables.name: OLLAMA_HOST
environmentVariables.description: URL for local Ollama LLM server (optional, for local inference)
